# Transforms Reference

::: {.callout-note}
TODO: For each `R/transforms/*.R` file, document the pure function it exposes,
input/output contract, and edge cases.
:::

## Planned transforms

- `tax_period.R` — parse `TAXPER` (6-char `YYYYMM`) into `tax_year` (int) and `tax_month` (int).
- `ein.R` — zero-pad to 9 chars, validate numeric-castable.
- `subsection.R` — integer coercion + validate against `KNOWN_SUBSECTION_CODES`; derive `is_501c3 = (subsection == 3)` indicator column.
- `financial_amounts.R` — numeric coercion, NA on parse failure, log failure counts.
- `indicators.R` — `_cd` columns: {Y,1,T,TRUE} → TRUE, {N,0,F,FALSE} → FALSE, else NA.
